subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - BIRD execution accuracy reaches 75.63%: This open-source NL2SQL solution has reached SOTA-level performance
- Spider Test EX reaches 89.65%: Complex SQL generation capability is in the top tier
- Reproducible setup completed in 2-4 days: Includes the BIRD reproduction and evaluation workflow
- Lower the barrier to using SQL: Natural language can generate high-quality query scripts

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Convert user query requirements described in natural language into SQL statements.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology
**Category**: Service
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing, Data Governance, Foundation Large Model, Model Evaluation, NL2SQL, Database, Operations

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: 2-4 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm expert

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Traditional database operations require specialized operations staff or database administrators and demand strong SQL skills; algorithm practitioners who need specific data also face the cost of learning SQL
- Traditional manual approval workflows are cumbersome and inefficient
- High data movement and large data volumes create additional challenges for the task

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - User instruction understanding: Accurately understands the user's SQL generation requirements expressed in natural language
- Best SQL script generation: Filters and retrieves multiple candidate SQL instruction patterns based on user requirements, integrates, checks, and ranks them, and returns the optimal result

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Leading performance: XiYanSQL-QwenCoder achieved 75.63% EX on BIRD, reaching open-source SOTA.
- Strong generalization: EX reached 89.65% on Spider Test, with stable performance on complex query generation.
- Reproducible solution: Provides rapid setup steps and the BIRD evaluation process based on this model.
- Business-friendly: Natural language can generate SQL directly, significantly lowering the barrier to database operations.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private deployment - server deployment edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI republished and verified
- **Chinese Name**: Alibaba Cloud Team
- **English Name**: Alibaba Cloud XGenerationLab
- **Author Website**: https://cn.aliyun.com/product/bailian/xiyan
- **Initial Release Date**: 2025-03
- **Last Updated**: 2026-03-10
- **Last Reviewed**: 2026-03-10
- **Key Dependencies**: XiYan-SQL · XiYanSQL-QwenCoder

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/MwQwwdPv6iLNX0kRgS9c2eW0ndf?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Time to generate a single SQL script does not exceed 1 second
- Average SQL script generation accuracy reaches 95%
- Reduce labor cost by 50%
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Same as the business metrics
